findings.detail: Reads cleanly start-to-verdict: name costly mistake -> choose metric -> size test set -> set threshold -> compare -> branch to Ship (green) or Rework (amber). Title banner carries the governing 'decided in advance' idea. No overlaps, no truncation; all labels and edge labels legible at 1400px. Metric names confined to the metric node's subtitle, not exploded into separate nodes. No out-of-scope nodes (no ECE/Z-score/K-fold/data-split).

stats.layout: flowchart LR (linear pipeline with terminal pass/fail branch)
